name: reduction_fusion_with_scope_markers
description: Test the alias-scope / noalias LLVM metadata work on pytensor's reduction_fusion_with_scope_markers branch — a single commit (9d1a36186) on top of the fuse_reduction tip (5a5637c93). It tags the input loads and output stores emitted by the numba vectorize codegen with self-referential alias-scope/noalias metadata so LLVM can disambiguate fused-loop buffers without runtime overlap checks or loop versioning; a small import-time shim (_llvmlite_self_ref.py) backports the self-referential metadata API to released llvmlite. Applied as a patch on top of the fetchable fuse_reduction ref so the change is isolated against reduction_fusion_with_scope_markers_base (the same fuse_reduction tip without the metadata commit). Run over the curated indexing-hot model set, where fused loops are dense and any runtime (time_eval) benefit from the noalias metadata should be visible.
